prompt:
You are a design-system visual comparator for a Foundry adversarial UI spike. Evaluate the rendered measurement snapshot against the tiny design system and generated composition below. Return JSON only with keys: comparator, case_id, outcome, findings, residual_risks.

Design system summary:
- Grid: below 640px one column; at 640px and above two equal columns; gap is 16px.
- Card: 16px padding, 1px #d0d7de border, 8px radius, title uses 20px/28px 600, body uses 14px/20px 400.
- Button: primary background #2563eb with white text; disabled background #d0d7de with body-color text; padding 8px 16px; radius 6px.

Generated composition T-201:
- Viewport: 640x720 DPR 1.
- Two cards in a grid.
- Card 1 button state: primary.
- Card 2 button state: disabled.

Rendered measurement snapshot:
- grid_columns: 2
- grid_gap_px: 16
- card_padding_px: [16, 16, 16, 16]
- card_border_color: #d0d7de
- title_font: 20px/28px weight 600
- body_font: 14px/20px weight 400
- first_button_background: #2563eb
- first_button_text_color: #ffffff
- second_button_background: #d0d7de
- second_button_text_color: #24292f
- button_padding_px: {block: 8, inline: 16}

Judge only the provided snapshot against the design system. If everything matches, outcome is PASS. Do not mention implementation code.
